Interface MaintenanceRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Maintenance, UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Maintenance, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Maintenance, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Maintenance, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Maintenance, UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Maintenance>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Maintenance, UUID>
public interface MaintenanceRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Maintenance, UUID>
Maintenance Repository

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Maintenance>
    findAllByVehicle(Vehicle vehicle)
    Finds all maintenances associated to a vehicle
    Optional<Maintenance>
    findByTypeAndDateAndVehicle(Maintenance.MaintenanceType type, LocalDate date, Vehicle vehicle)
    Finds a maintenance for a specific vehicle, date and type, assuring the user can't create the same maintenance twice

  • Method Details

    • findAllByVehicle

      List<Maintenance> findAllByVehicle(Vehicle vehicle)
      Finds all maintenances associated to a vehicle
      Parameters:
      vehicle - The given vehicle
      Returns:
      A list with all maintenances associated. Can be empty if there isn't any

    • findByTypeAndDateAndVehicle

      Optional<Maintenance> findByTypeAndDateAndVehicle(Maintenance.MaintenanceType type, LocalDate date, Vehicle vehicle)
      Finds a maintenance for a specific vehicle, date and type, assuring the user can't create the same maintenance twice
      Parameters:
      type - The type of the maintenance
      date - The date when the maintenance occurred
      vehicle - The given vehicle associated to the maintenance
      Returns:
      A maintenance if any is present
